action: Integrate provenance verification and claim validation into one fail-closed evidence acceptance decision without conflating provenance with truth.

progress.finding: Acceptance must require successful signature verification, artifact digest binding, trusted builder and source identities, expected build type, recognized external parameters, and a separate claim-evidence decision.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using byte-identical pre-commit files

handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel workflows should map actual signature, digest, builder, source, buildType, parameter-policy, and claim-validator results into this gate. No unperformed check may be represented as true.
